name: Ceiling beams + lantern grid
description: Cross-beams under the room ceiling + suspended lanterns on a 4-cell grid. Style-varied (oak/dark_oak/spruce logs and lanterns/sea_lantern/soul_lantern). Universal: applies to ANY room of ANY building tall enough (h ≥ 5). Lifts light_coverage.
placement_rules: One beam along x at z=centre, one along z at x=centre, at y1-2.
Lanterns hung at y1-3 at the cross intersection + every 4 cells on a grid.
lighting_ventilation: Lanterns provide light radius ~7 from each source.
python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.ceiling_fixture.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
